insp_e93c439350756eac.spoken: There are two distinct sets of footprints. A human's, ending at the chalk outline, and a larger set, possibly Ork or Troll, following just behind the first.

insp_f0207221845dac9d.spoken: This worklight is new. You can see that all of the alley’s normal lights have been ruined. Upon closer inspection, it seems that they've all imploded - as if some force shattered them all at the same time.

insp_e5e5616e0ca1c821.spoken: Amidst the shards of glass from the broken lights, you find a small piece of glass which looks like the bottom of a test tube.

insp_8f18f1d7dd7cfa6b.spoken: The sounds of laughter and music emanate from within... but you should finish your investigation first.

insp_1a869bb6ae13a9e1.spoken: Lying on the pavement is the body of a young human female. Her eyes have been gouged cleanly out, and you notice a string of bite marks along her left arm.

insp_8205f89fee3a0876.spoken: You find a small velvet bag filled with precious gems.

insp_f7c17f679021acf2.spoken: Some loose nuyen is laying on the crate.

insp_b337007b050e90e0.spoken: You find a money clip full of nuyen and a medkit.

insp_976098e2e91ba71a.spoken: You don't need to go right now.

insp_53202bca1e0a3ca3.spoken: The old poster depicts a svelte young woman posing with an assault rifle.

insp_52b0f35303bf8110.spoken: The clock's stopped, probably displaying a time from 40 years ago.

insp_730fe363014fc26b.spoken: It's an automated medication dispensary. It doesn't recognize you, so nothing happens.

insp_f8d0d9ad28254eb1.spoken: The surgical cart is strewn with gruesome tools - motorized saws and metal vices.

insp_ef0a48107f1492fb.spoken: This globe glows with an unearthly light. The areas around Tir Tairngire and Tír na nÓg are especially bright.

insp_182da0daa1660d84.spoken: The cold storage box is labeled "Live Specimen. Keep Refrigerated"

insp_b370e435a70bbcee.spoken: The fridge contains mostly things that are either brown or green, with the primary difference seeming to be age.

insp_4ce80a05b87c7c76.spoken: An industrial-sized food processor that could make food for an army of babies.

insp_8dac08f5a33be8d9.spoken: There is a variety of sweets, including some red and blue candy.

insp_723d28fe752a2562.spoken: The table is covered with snack foods.

insp_a28bf55b82f6769b.spoken: The desk is covered in photos of dogs. The one catching a stick is labeled "My my diminutive friend".

insp_09cecfce0903718b.spoken: The crate's label reads "Liquefied cane sugar, 1 gallon cans, 24 count" You see lots of these around on the shelves.

insp_712fa0c6696f0ac3.spoken: The wastebasket is stuffed with letters from people looking for missing loved ones who have disappeared after joining the Universal Brotherhood.

insp_fbdc7945a9959fa0.spoken: A box full of industrial toilet cleaner.

insp_284aa17b89a36f46.spoken: You open the box to find it swarming with extremely large cockroaches.

insp_9a178f3188ccf23c.spoken: The wastebasket is filled with dozens of outgoing letters from new Brothers and Sisters to family members.

insp_6e97de135a3ebd43.spoken: Searching through the desk, you find a list of money transfers made by the Brotherhood.

insp_73385deedfbc6a8d.spoken: A pile of broken bodies. The bones look... twisted and their jaws hang open seemingly in terror.

insp_a6bc2021f0a40f3f.spoken: It's displaying a map of the UCAS. Chicago is listed as a priority.

insp_205533af93ca488a.spoken: Looks like Coyote keeps her clothes in boxes on the floor.

insp_5de8472b97ae1763.spoken: The stand is littered with action movies and cigarette butts.

insp_3e4abf91f64c5198.spoken: It's a framed GED from South Seattle Community College.

insp_1fd280d7f8d7e5d5.spoken: A framed painting of the Chicago skyline, done in stylized silhouette.

insp_ee1b665f5b9667ea.spoken: The stuffed bear seems to be hiding something.

insp_b17169b524e96940.spoken: Your computer. State of the art in 2050. Broken since 2051.

insp_a072ff54d57b2894.spoken: A slip of paper with your bank balance. Enough to cover you through the end of the week.

insp_0e3e32a1cb81e65c.spoken: You find an unlabeled trivid disc. You have no way of playing back the disc, but its serial number could be useful.

insp_4b48e0d1539500ad.spoken: The door is locked, but you might be able to bypass it if you could get under the maintenance panel.

insp_f0508b721d43d839.spoken: Only Marie-Louise can use this node
